reviews.review_description:
There's a clone called pipe craft, I would complain about the clone more but the last update for pipe dreams was in 2022? 

Hey dev, are you still active?

reviews.review_title: fun game to just chill out to.
reviews.review_description: really have alot of fun playing this.

Nice concept and rehash in vr but thr play area is kinda limited and certain grabs feel clunky..  fun puzzler that needs som polishing but overall a fun solo experience to hop in and out of. Very relaxing and head scratcher

developer_response.body: Hey ultra, I'm glad you had a fun time in Pipe Dream Co.! Thank you for the helpful feedback, we will look into the little bugs, issues, and clunkiness to further improve your experience in our game, so stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: Played this game recently and am very pleased with the concept. The game is very well designed and the way of puzzling is also very challenging. It is difficult to develop a good game in these times, but I have to say that it worked out well!

developer_response.body: Thank you, we're glad you enjoyed the game!

reviews.review_description: Love this game ,  extremely frustrating in a fun way ,  and even when you think you can't do it , you suddenly figure it out 🤣 highly recommended

developer_response.body: Thanks, mrsdobbo! Yeah that's how it is with puzzle games, sometimes you gotta just go for the first thing that comes to mind.

reviews.review_description: A nice and simple puzzle game. The levels get a little bit harder each time. I think it’s a great game to kids and to just get your brain ticking.

developer_response.body: Thank you, m155YU! Yes, those are some core elements for any puzzle game!

reviews.review_description:
I played 2d edition of a similar game, and this is bringing me back a couple of years ago.

Still fun, intuitive to use!

Would definitely recommend to any puzzle fans, and for this price, it is a no-brainer!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback, hydro47! We're glad that you found our game nostalgic.

reviews.review_description: Sooo good.

As I was gifted this I wanted to play a little more of it before I left a review to be totally fair, when I 1st played it I had a few issues with menus not being in the right place and off to the side even when I turned to look at them, this now seems to be fixed which may of been due to a console update so now the menu is easily viewable.
A very simple but fun game for a while, not my usual type of game although I do enjoy puzzles the game is simply direct the flow of water using various pipes as quick as you can before it runs out. Sounds simple but can be quite tricky at times. A few updates would make this game better such as the ability to move the blocks you are filling with pipes as to make playing and viewing pipes a little easier as some pipes are further back that you need to reach to place.
A good game for those that like a simple puzzle game and also for other people to improve hand to eye coordination using the quest
Thanks to the developer for gifting this item for an honest review and sorry it took so long to leave this review.
I feel this may be the start of good things to come by this developer and look forward to see what they come up with next.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the detailed review, RamiTuppa!

reviews.review_title: A very fun and interactive puzzle game!
reviews.review_description: This was a very fun and unique puzzle game! It’s different from any other puzzle game I have ever played, and that’s what sets it apart. I really like how natural the control feels as you are grabbing pipes to control the water flow. I am hoping at some point you will be able to play without using the controllers, and just use your hands. Maybe a cool pass through feature? But this was really fun, and I am happy to have had the chance to play it. I would recommend it as a way to familiarize yourself with VR!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback and the awesome suggestion, we'll look into enabling some hand tracking into our game! in the mean time, stay tuned for future fixes in updates!

reviews.review_description: Cool puzzle game..or even plumbing simulator
If you’re into puzzles this is for you. This take problem solving and puzzles into a whole new level. Loved it.

developer_response.body: Thank you, Islandgal! We're glad you enjoyed playing our game.

reviews.review_description:
It’s a great game to play in between games if you liked pipe puzzles from back in the day.
The controls are very basic so anyone can play this game.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback, CamelSAMA. Yeah we try our best to make our game as user-friendly as possible.

reviews.review_description:
What I enjoyed the most.. 
- The games concept is fun, quick and good for brain training.
- it gave me a purpose to think quick with the score board/ water saving meter
- motion wise was all good, good controller tracking and could not find a bug or glitch in grabbing and adding to the grid which is brilliant.
- Was funny to sign my life away at the beginning like I had accepted my purpose as a water saver and the fact I have to accept a new position to move forward 🤣 
- The clipboard is a brilliant idea, makes me feel like im the save water guy.
- I like the description on the clipboard that explains about jobs such as "Can you believe they left this tap running all day" made me feel like it was MY Job to save the pipes. 
- I love the fact you have to hit a quota before advancing to the next section such as saving 48000ml of water which is totalled by all the other levels in that section. Gave me a reason to go back to the other levels. 

Possible updates or ideas? 

Moving items ect. 
- When moving the clipboard it should be able to stick wherever I place it and I keep having to turn my head right round to move on. I don't mind it but could be good for lazy sit on sofa people.
- the right index button to move the grid is brilliant now if you had a option to move the grid left to right or to rotate the grid with both index buttons that would be awesome or else my hands end up in weird positions or maybe even a quick button to rotate the pipe? Then people could speed run this game like a Rubix cube and could get competitive.


Possible future potential?
- it has really great promise but after a while it's the same just with harder levels.. now maybe add a story such as a lonely plumber who has to save the water crisis in the area, doesn't need animation or anything just a background of like different houses, under the sink, under building plumbing, sewer works and as the jobs get bigger the levels get harder?
- Possibly a star rating or job satisfactory sheet for the score board
- Possible coin system for (saving water x Speed = more profit) and the coins can be used for new looking gloves ect? Gives a purpose to keep redoing the levels and interest in the game potentially as ild feel I have something to go back to.
- Possibly daily challenges? That are always different because if I know a level I can be very quick as it doesn't change.
- Hand Update?
- if possible a multiplayer, i would demolish my friends at this!!

But in all honesty, I enjoy my time here and would keep coming back from time to time but its needs just that tiny bit extra to pull me in and feel like a need to complete the game 

Its very well made and I enjoyed my time in it.

Thanks for allowing me to review it :)

developer_response.body: Thank you for the detailed feedback, Deathstowel! We are looking into improving the minor issues and adding some features here and there in the future, so keep an eye out for future updates!

reviews.review_description: I wasn't sure exactly what to expect, but the game is actually quite fun. Though simple in design, it does its job to entertain while keeping you challenged. I'm definitely going to be playing more.

developer_response.body: We're glad you had a good time playing our game, Tyleran!

reviews.review_title: Simple and brain cracking puzzle fun
reviews.review_description: Not bad. Great for first time VR experience.

developer_response.body: Thank you! we're glad you enjoyed it.

reviews.review_description: The idea could not be more simple, use all the pipes to close the water circuit. And do it as soon as you can to get higher score, so you can move along into new levels! The game idea is great, and for the people who likes puzzles or do not have a lot of time to spent in videogames, this is a good choice. Still there are some features to be improved (e.g. more freedom when moving the playing area,) but I'm sure they will keep improving it. Congratulations to the developer team!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review! Yes, we'll be looking into your concerns and improve the game.

reviews.review_description: This is a great puzzle type game ! Makes you think and keep going !!! Highly recommend it !!!!

reviews.review_title: Classic phone game well executed in VR
reviews.review_description:
I love puzzle games like cubism and saw this game on sale for $1.99. For that price it was worth the blind purchase. This game is easily worth $1.99 and I would have paid $9.99.

This is a hidden gem that is well polished enough to be on the main quest store.  This is the pipe game I grew up loving on my phone. It is well executed in 3D and with it being VR it makes pipe placement and turning so natural.  The developer even includes some cute touches such as adding fish to the water as the level fills!

Challenges ramp up nicely. My only complaint is I want more. More levels, maybe larger levels, t pipes with 2 different “outlets” to build to!

Great job developers. I hope you continue to make updates. I’d love to see more levels!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the awesome review, Kopper23! We are glad you enjoyed our game!

reviews.review_description: Great game me myself and not good with puzzle games but this game it makes me want to focus and try to figure it out and it's a very fun game to play if you have time and or want to chill and relax I would highly recommend this game and the developers did a great job with the game
